user_message: The CSA escalated Evergreen Solutions to me -- can you triage this?

input_artifacts.content:
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-04 15:48 EST
Subject: Follow-up: partner engagement Review

Our team encountered some challenges with partner engagement. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
Date: 2024-02-23 16:43 EST
Subject: Re: partner engagement Discussion - Next Steps

Our team encountered some challenges with partner engagement. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-07 15:38 EST
Subject: partner engagement - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with partner engagement. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF16-A trap (Mismatches tone (formal where casual was established)); produces complete Thread summary, key commitments/asks identified, waiting-on-whom assessment, draft response matching
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF16-A failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF16-A failure mode (Mismatches tone (formal where casual was established))
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct partner engagement decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF16-A -- Mismatches tone (formal where casual was established)
